name: @etzhayyim/atproto-client
description: AT Protocol client facade (createAgent/xrpc) + PDS read/write helpers (createAccount/login/createRecord/getRecord/listRecords/resolvePds) over @atproto/api. Relocated from etzhayyim/root:20-actors/etzhayyim-sdk/src/{atproto,pds}.ts per the kotoba-lang library-placement rule (ADR-2606302300). Distinct from kotoba-lang/atproto (a CLJC-only protocol-vocabulary library with no HTTP client code) -- this package is the executing client.
